channel.title: React on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in React on Arrans github.io

item.title: lingdojo/kana-dojo
item.description: Aesthetic, minimalist platform for learning Japanese inspired by Duolingo and Monkeytype, built with Next.js and sponsored by Vercel. Beginner-friendly with plenty of good first issues - all contributions are welcome!

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: usememos/memos
item.description: Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.

item.title: stack-auth/stack-auth
item.description: Open-source Auth0/Clerk alternative

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

item.title: mattermost/mattermost
item.description: Mattermost is an open source platform for secure collaboration across the entire software development lifecycle..

item.title: iib0011/omni-tools
item.description: Self-hosted collection of powerful web-based tools for everyday tasks. No ads, no tracking, just fast, accessible utilities right from your browser!

item.title: shadcn-ui/ui
item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.title: oven-sh/bun
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: donetick/donetick
item.description: Donetick an open-source, user-friendly app for managing tasks and chores, featuring customizable options to help you and others stay organized

item.title: novuhq/novu
item.description: The open-source notification infrastructure. In-app Inbox component, E-mail, SMS, Push and Slack Integrations.

item.title: AykutSarac/jsoncrack.com
item.description: ✨ Innovative and open-source visualization application that transforms various data formats, such as JSON, YAML, XML and CSV into interactive graphs.

item.title: facebook/docusaurus
item.description: Easy to maintain open source documentation websites.

item.title: marmelab/atomic-crm
item.description: A full-featured CRM built with React, shadcn/ui, and Supabase.

item.title: chartdb/chartdb
item.description: Database diagrams editor that allows you to visualize and design your DB with a single query.

item.title: blinkospace/blinko
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

item.title: getlago/lago
item.description: Open Source Metering and Usage Based Billing API ⭐️ Consumption tracking, Subscription management, Pricing iterations, Payment orchestration & Revenue analytics

item.title: vercel/chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: aliasvault/aliasvault
item.description: Privacy-first password manager with built-in email aliasing. Fully encrypted and self-hostable.

item.title: typicode/mistcss
item.description: Create visual components for React without JavaScript or TypeScript. Leverage native HTML and CSS. It’s an alternative to CSS-in-JS and CSS modules.

item.title: keybase/client
item.description: Keybase Go Library, Client, Service, OS X, iOS, Android, Electron

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.title: spliit-app/spliit
item.description: Free and Open Source Alternative to Splitwise. Share expenses with your friends and family.

item.title: refinedev/refine
item.description: A React Framework for building internal tools, admin panels, dashboards & B2B apps with unmatched flexibility.

item.title: kern/filepizza
item.description: 🍕 Peer-to-peer file transfers in your browser

item.title: ironcalc/IronCalc
item.description: Main engine of the IronCalc ecosystem

item.title: ritz078/transform
item.description: A polyglot web converter.

item.title: dittofeed/dittofeed
item.description: Open-source customer engagement. Automate transactional and marketing messages across email, SMS, mobile push, WhatsApp, Slack, and more 📨

item.title: chartbrew/chartbrew
item.description: Open-source reporting platform to build and share live dashboards from APIs, SQL and NoSQL databases, with powerful AI assistant, scheduling, and embeddable charts 📈📊

item.title: aizhimou/pigeon-pod
item.description: Listen to YouTube & Bilibili. Anywhere.

item.title: gommzystudio/device-activity-tracker
item.description: A phone number can reveal whether a device is active, in standby or offline (and more). This PoC demonstrates how delivery receipts + RTT timing leak sensitive device-activity patterns. (WhatsApp / Signal)

item.title: herol3oy/austen
item.description: 📚 discover story relationships

item.title: TheNickOfTime/handbrake-web
item.description: A self-hosted platform to use HandBrake on your headless devices via a bespoke web interface. Harness the processing power of multiple devices to work on a single queue.

item.title: MertJSX/folderhost
item.description: Your own private cloud in one executable. Share files, collaborate on code, and manage users without complex setup.

item.title: goatplatform/goatdb
item.description: A peer-to-peer database that spans devices. For apps and agents that work everywhere.

item.title: arran4/gorillas-react
item.description: Generated gorillas in react

item.title: VityaSchel/lufin
item.description: Read-only mirror of https://git.hloth.dev/hloth/lufin

item.title: necdetsanli/do-not-ghost-me
item.description: Anonymous reports and stats about recruitment ghosting. Next.js + PostgreSQL, privacy-first and open source.
